summary: Iteration 110: CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED - Hotel Details page hooks order bug fixed. The useEffect for nearbyPins is now correctly placed BEFORE early return statements (lines 558-588 before line 602). All Hotel Details and Hotel Results features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: HotelDetails.jsx: HOOKS FIX VERIFIED - useEffect for nearbyPins at lines 558-588 is BEFORE early returns at lines 602-618
HotelDetails.jsx: getServiceIcon function at line 591 creates colored markers for nearby services
HotelsResults.jsx: Extended filters working - Guest Rating (Any, 7+, 8+, 8.5+, 9+), Free Cancellation, Breakfast Included
Backend allergens API working correctly - verified via curl (Peanuts, Shellfish, Fish, Gluten, Eggs present in menu items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL hooks bug fix verified. Hotel Details page loads without 'Rendered more hooks than during previous render' error. All nearby service filter buttons (Restaurants, Car Rentals, Cinemas, Events) work and show 'Showing X near Y' text. Policies section shows check-in/out times. Hotel Results has compact navy header, Grid/List toggle, and extended filters. Restaurant Menu allergen badges are implemented in code (lines 480-483) but CDN rate-limiting (403 errors) prevented full UI verification - backend API confirmed working.

CRITICAL_hotel_details_hooks_fix.details: Page loads without React hooks error. useEffect for nearbyPins correctly placed BEFORE early returns.

hotel_details_map_with_marker.details: Map area visible with 'Explore the area' section and address display

hotel_details_nearby_service_filters.details: All 4 filter buttons found (Restaurants, Car Rentals, Cinemas, Events) with data-testid attributes

hotel_details_nearby_filter_status_text.details: Clicking Restaurants filter shows 'Showing restaurants near Douala' text

hotel_details_policies_section.details: Check-in (14:00) and Check-out (12:00) times visible in Policies card

hotel_details_rooms_section.details: Choose your room section with 4 room types, List/Grid toggle, room cards with pricing

hotel_results_compact_header.details: Navy gradient header with 'Hotels in Douala', 'May 1 - May 3', '2N' badge, '2' guests, Edit button

hotel_results_grid_list_toggle.details: Grid and List view toggle buttons work correctly

hotel_results_extended_filters.details: Filter sheet contains: Price Range, Star Rating, Amenities, Minimum Guest Rating (Any/7+/8+/8.5+/9+), Deals & Policies (Free Cancellation, Breakfast Included)

restaurant_menu_allergens_backend.details: Backend API returns allergens correctly: Peanuts, Shellfish, Fish, Gluten, Eggs in menu items

restaurant_menu_allergens_frontend_code.details: Allergen badges implemented at lines 480-483 with data-testid. IngredientsModal shows allergens at lines 147-155. CDN rate-limiting prevented full UI test.
